name: Haru Aomi
description: A girl in [Saku](https://anilist.co/character/208618/Saku-Chitose)'s friend group and a member of the girl's basketball team. Haru is very comfortable talking to boys due to her aligning interests with them. She is very athletic, an excellent basketball player and a very close friend of [Yuzuki Nanase](https://anilist.co/character/208619/Yuzuki-Nanase)'s.

name: Hinako Sakuragi
description: __Height:__ 160 cm __Weight:__ 52 kg The protagonist. She's bad at dealing with other people but animals love her, so she used to work as a scarecrow in the countryside. She goes to Tokyo to enter a high-school theatrical club.

name: Hiroomi Souma
description: Another chef who works in the kitchen, Souma is a young man with an easygoing attitude. He often blackmails other workers to do his job for him and pass it off as a form of modesty from the other employees. He can blackmail anyone except Inami, who punches him even before he manages to talk to her. He is terrified of Inami's urges and is thankful for Souta's existence in the restaurant since Inami is taking out her urges all on Souta and not him.

name: Irene  Holton
description: Irene Holton is the only daughter of the Holton Family. She was known as the Monarch of Destitution.Irene is an innocent girl that is at first reluctant to do anything.But during the fight against the relic Hand of Midas, with the help of Seo Joo-Heon, she gained confidence and dominate the relic and now have complete control over it. After the event, she gained more confidence and will help Seo Joo-Heon do every tasks.

name: Ishid Lucrenze
description: Captain of the Order of the White Night and Archduke of Lucrenze. He owns the heavenly sword Ciergo and is one of the five fire mages currently alive. He is also known as the Knight of the Crimson Flame.

name: Jinpachi Toudou
description: Toudou has a very cheerful, childish, boastful, and loud personality. He constantly references his fanclub and his own beauty, a habit which often irritates others, resulting in them telling him to shut up or dismissing his claims. His personality turns serious whenever he's climbing, as he takes races very seriously. He is the vice captain because he established his position as the best climber early on, and he normally makes very level-headed decisions. Despite his seemingly vain nature, Toudo

name: Julius Von Pallistan
nativeName: ジュリアス ・フォン・パリスタン
description: The first prince of the Kingdom of Pallistan. Unlike his brother, Julius stands calm, charming, and interested in strange things. He does not wish to be a mere figurehead for the masses and desires to understand his people of the kingdom he will eventually lead. He's the first to notice [Scarlett](https://anilist.co/character/255701/El-Vandimion-Scarlett)'s hidden personality and would often tease and observe her to witness this core of her being rise to the surface. His legs were replaced with Texhnolyze legs that allow him to hear the 'voice of the city', which are visions the Mothers send to him about things that will happen in Lux. name: Ken Amada
description: __Height:__140 cm (4'7") __Inital Persona:__ Nemesis __Ultimate Persona:__ Kala-Nemi Ken Amada is the youngest human member of SEES, and one of the two who don't attend Gekkoukan High School. He is mature, but sometimes he is too precocious for his own good. He uses long spears to make up for his short stature. name: Kirara Hazama
description: She is a student in Korosensei's Class 3-E. Hazama is a quiet girl who loves reading, preferring to sit in the shade with a book rather than swim during summer gym classes and wants to become a librarian. She even recommended to Itona the novel, The Count of Monte Cristo, though accidentally spoiled the ending. She prefers dark stories and horror novels, and because of this also has an interest in the occult which she displayed when she attempted to use a curse on Korosensei.

name: Kirumi Toujou
description: __Height:__ 176cm (5'9") __Talent:__ Ultimate Maid A super high school student with a keen mind and talented in various sports. While working a part time job as a maid, she’s able to carry out any job, and has created a reputation for doing perfect work. In the past, she was even selected as a bodyguard for visiting heads of state. However, she says that of course she turned down the job in order to not ruin a country, according to her words. (Source: VNDB)

name: Koto Tsukinoki
description: A third-year student at Tsuwabuki High who's a massive fujoshi. She is the vice president of the Literature Club and the former Vice President of the Student Council. She's currently in preparation to go to University outside of Toyohashi. She is the girlfriend of [Shintaro Tamaki](https://anilist.co/character/339760/Shintarou-Tamaki) and also his childhood friend.

name: Koyori Tanemura
description: __Height__: 138.6 cm (4'6") A class representative in Hana's class. She aspires to be someone that everyone can rely on, but is often unreliable herself.

name: Kuroneko
description: Kuroneko-sama (黒猫様 lit. 'black cat Martian Lord/Lady') is, as her name suggests, a black cat. (Yasuhiro Nightow has said that the cat is female, and he would know: Kuroneko-sama was one of the first characters he created for the manga.) Her formal name is Kuroneko Kukan, or Black Cat Space. She appears in every episode at least once, usually as a running joke of popping her oval-shaped, green-eyed head on screen at some opportune moment and usually uttering a simple "nyaa." name: Lily Shirogane
description: Lily Shirogane is a main character of the Aikatsu Stars! series. She is a student at Four Star Academy and is an admin of the Flower Song Class. Lily is a cool-type idol whose preferred brand is her self-created brand Gothic Victoria.

name: Maria
description: __Height:__ 158 cm Maria is Nagi's maid and surrogate older sister/mother, both appearing and acting in a manner more mature than people typical of her age. Because of this, even people near to her speak of her as if she is older than she really is, a pet peeve for her. A phrase she commonly responds back with is "I'm still a fresh seventeen year old". She is the character with the most common sense, although her sense of value in money is as bad as Nagi's, and appears to be the one in charge of

name: Mary
description: __Race:__ Vampire Mary is a Vampire Hunter, dedicated in putting an end to [Elizabeth](https://anilist.co/character/217044/Elizabeth), the Vampire Queen. (Source: To Be a Power in the Shadows! Wiki)

name: Mashiro Tsukinomori
description: [Akiteru](https://anilist.co/character/206365)'s cousin, she's also in his class at school. Usually reserved, she is particularly cruel when it comes to Akiteru. She is a fan of everything under the sea. Her LIME profile picture is a seashell. ~!She secretly writes under the pen name of Makigai Namako. As Namako, her LIME profile picture is a sea cucumber.!~

name: Nadeshiko Yamato
description: __Type:__ America __Occupation:__ Japanese Language Teacher __Debut:__ Chapter 57 **Girlfriend No. 013** Nadeshiko has a very freedom loving and stereotypically American personality due to her fascination with the United States, this was due to her finding and watching a VHS tape of a group of American Children acting in contrary to her family's strict traditional Japanese customs. She does not seem to be able to speak English despite her love of America.
